Package de.uka.ilkd.key.proof

Interface ReplacementMap<S extends SyntaxElement,T>

Type Parameters:
S - the type of the elements to replace.
T - the type of the replacements.
All Superinterfaces:
Map<S,T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
ReplacementMap, ReplacementMap.DefaultReplacementMap, ReplacementMap.NoIrrelevantLabelsReplacementMap, TermReplacementMap, VariableReplacementMap
public interface ReplacementMap<S extends SyntaxElement,T> extends Map<S,T>
A map to be used in an OpReplacer. It maps operators that should be replaced to their replacements.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static class 
    ReplacementMap.DefaultReplacementMap<S extends SyntaxElement,T>
    The replacement map type to use if TermLabelSettings.getUseOriginLabels() is false.
    static class 
    ReplacementMap.NoIrrelevantLabelsReplacementMap<S extends SyntaxElement,T>
    The replacement map type to use if TermLabelSettings.getUseOriginLabels() is true.

  • Method Details

    • create

      static <S extends SyntaxElement, T> ReplacementMap<S,T> create(TermFactory tf, Proof proof)
      Creates a new replacement map.
      Type Parameters:
      S - the type of the elements to replace.
      T - the type of the replacements.
      Parameters:
      tf - a term factory.
      proof - the currently loaded proof, or null if no proof is loaded.
      Returns:
      a new replacement map.

    • create

      static <S extends SyntaxElement, T> ReplacementMap<S,T> create(TermFactory tf, Proof proof, Map<S,T> initialMappings)
      Creates a new replacement map.
      Type Parameters:
      S - the type of the elements to replace.
      T - the type of the replacements.
      Parameters:
      tf - a term factory.
      proof - the currently loaded proof, or null if no proof is loaded.
      initialMappings - a map whose mapping should be added to the new replacement map.
      Returns:
      a new replacement map.
